creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text: When I took over it there were two different applications: mbmon and xmbmon(the GUI of mbmon). I merged it into a single port. And hence when you are chosing X11 as an option it will install the xmbmon app in X11 resource directory. I think it is perfectly alright where it is now. On the other hand the CLI app is installed in ${LOCALBASE}/bin.
